title: salix humillima var. puberula
intro: Salix humillima var. puberula, also known as the pubescent willow, is a variety of willow plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Salix humillima var. puberula include relief from headaches, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
